zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine de Bourbon於1342年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲時，她的父親Duc Pierre De Bourbon I31歲，母親Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon29歲。她於1359年10月14日與Jean d'Harcourt VI在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲盧福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1427年7月4日在法國諾門迪艾哈爾庫特享年85歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪艾哈爾庫特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine de Bourbon于1342年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲时，她的父亲Duc Pierre De Bourbon I31岁，母亲Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon29岁。她于1359年10月14日与Jean d'Harcourt VI在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲盧福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1427年7月4日在法国諾門迪艾哈爾庫特享年85岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪艾哈爾庫特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine de Bourbon was born in 1342, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, her father, Duc Pierre De Bourbon I, was 31 and her mother, Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, was 29. She married Jean d'Harcourt VI on 14 October 1359, in Louvre, Paris, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 4 July 1427, in Harcourt, Eure, Normandy, France, at the age of 85, and was buried in Harcourt, Eure, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine de Bourbon est née en 1342, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, son père, Duc Pierre De Bourbon I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Jean d'Harcourt VI le 14 octobre 1359, à Louvre, Paris, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 juillet 1427, à Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine de Bourbon 1342 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Duc Pierre De Bourbon I 31 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon 29. Sie hat am 14. Oktober 1359 in Louvre, Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich Jean d'Harcourt VI geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Juli 1427 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Bourbon è nata il nel 1342 nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Duc Pierre De Bourbon I, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Jean d'Harcourt VI il 14 ottobre 1359, nel Louvre, Paris, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 4 luglio 1427, nel Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolta a Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bourbonが1342年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで生まれた時，父Duc Pierre De Bourbon Iは31歳，母Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbonは29歳であった。1359年10月14日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスロウvアでJean d'Harcourt VIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1427年7月4日にフランスノーマンディエウアハーコウルトで85歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディエウアハーコウルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bourbon(이)가 1342년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Duc Pierre De Bourbon I(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1359년 10월 14일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스 루브르에서 Jean d'Harcourt VI(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1427년 7월 4일 프랑스 노먼디 우르 하르쿠르트에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 우르 하르쿠르트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Bourbon nasceu em 1342, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Duc Pierre De Bourbon I, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean d'Harcourt VI em 14 de outubro de 1359, em Louvre, Paris, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de julho de 1427, em Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, França, com 85 anos, e foi sepultada em Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine de Bourbon родилась в 1342 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Duc Pierre De Bourbon I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean d'Harcourt VI 14 октября 1359 г. в местности лоувр, пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 4 июля 1427 г. в местности харкоурт, эур, норманди, Франция в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности харкоурт, эур, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine de Bourbon nació en 1342, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Duc Pierre De Bourbon I, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Jean d'Harcourt VI el 14 de octubre de 1359, en Louvre, Paris, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 4 de julio de 1427, en Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultada en Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Francia.
